headlines.title: After new drug’s ‘unprecedented’ results for pancreatic cancer, doctors look at other uses
headlines.description: The experimental drug daraxonrasib, which doubled survival time in patients with advanced pancreatic cancer, may also prove effective for lung, colon and ovarian cancers.

headlines.title: GLP-1 overdoses increase at an alarming rate as weight loss drugs become easier to buy online
headlines.description: Within 24 hours of injecting the first dose of a weight loss medication she received following a visit with a telehealth doctor, Karleigh McClain was admitted to the hospital, she said

headlines.title: Good news: You don’t need surgery. But you’ll have to apply maggots to your wound.
headlines.description: The lowly maggot gets a bad rap, mostly known for feeding on corpses and rotting meat.

headlines.title: At the Enhanced Games, drugs don’t get athletes banned. They could get them rich.
headlines.description: When Shania Collins was first approached about taking performance-enhancing drugs last year, it made her nervous enough to contact two members of the Drug Enforcement Administration — her parents.

headlines.title: Absence of USAID likely slowed Ebola detection and response, former officials say
headlines.description: The Trump administration hollowed out USAID last year, but the State Department denied the changes have hampered its response.

headlines.title: Top W.H.O. official in Ebola epicenter as deadly outbreak spreads
headlines.description: The head of the World Health Organization Saturday arrived in eastern DR Congo’s Bunia, a city at the heart of an outbreak of a rare type of Ebola, where the virus is still spreading faster than the response. NBC News’ Molly Hunter reports.

headlines.title: How to Spot the Signs of a Stroke and How to Take Action
headlines.description: Every year, about 800,00 people in the United States experience a stroke. Dr. Carolyn Brockington, vascular neurologist and director of the Stroke Center at Mount Sinai West in New York, joins TODAY with a checklist on the symptoms to look out for, how to take action and what you can do to help reduce the risk of stroke.

headlines.title: Alarming rise in weight loss drug overdoses
headlines.description: In an investigative report in partnership with KFF Health News, NBC News’ Anne Thompson reports on the growing cases of overdoses involving GLP-1 weight loss drugs.

headlines.title: Halle Berry Talks Turning 60: ‘I’m the Best Version of Myself’
headlines.description: Actor and women’s wellness advocate Halle Berry joins TODAY’s Jenna Bush Hager and Sheinelle Jones and talks about turning 60, looks back on her prolific career and discusses her new partnership with women's health company Nella. Berry opens up about feeling stronger, wiser, more in control, and like the "best version" of herself as she turns 60 this summer, saying “it’s a privilege to age.” Then, she shares how she hopes her partnership with Nella will help women advocate for themselv

headlines.title: Is the Forme Power Bra really worth $179?
headlines.description: I tested the Forme Power Bra for five months to see if it could improve my posture and back support. Here’s what actually happened.

headlines.title: The best running watches, tested over hundreds of miles
headlines.description: I’ve tested dozens of running watches from Garmin, Coros, Amazfit, Fitbit, Apple and more. Here are my top picks for beginners, races and ultra-athletes alike.

headlines.title: The best men’s walking shoes of 2026, tested and reviewed
headlines.description: Shop expert-recommended and staff-tested men’s walking shoes from Brooks, On, New Balance and Hoka.
